assessment_items.question_content:
**Which term refers to an ideal standard that could be studied and replicated?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The artist Polykleitos created the Doryphoros as a canon for others to study and replicate in sculpting the ideal nude.  

**[Watch this video to review.](/humanities/ancient-art-civilizations/greek-art/classical/v/polykleitos-doryphoros-spear-bearer)**

assessment_items.question_content:
**What subject is depicted in the *Doryphoros*?**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a603b524e704dec6402b2202c004d637.jpg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The Doryphoros (or spear bearer) depicts a warrior, though he is idealized as a heroic male nude.  

**[Watch this video to review.](/humanities/ancient-art-civilizations/greek-art/classical/v/polykleitos-doryphoros-spear-bearer)**

This sculpture is a Roman marble copy of a bronze figure from the Classical period of Greek art.  

**[Watch this video to review.](/humanities/ancient-art-civilizations/greek-art/classical/v/polykleitos-doryphoros-spear-bearer)**

choices.content: This is a Roman copy of a Greek sculpture from the Classical period.
This is a Greek sculpture from the Classical period.
This is a Greek copy of a Roman sculpture from the Classical period.
This is a Greek copy of an earlier bronze sculpture from the Classical period.

assessment_items.question_content:
**The Greeks based their ideal of beauty on $\_\_\_\_\_\_$.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The Greeks saw beauty in mathematical precision and ideal relationships in the proportions of an object.  

**[Watch this video to review.](/humanities/ancient-art-civilizations/greek-art/classical/v/polykleitos-doryphoros-spear-bearer)**

choices.content: the muscular bodies of Olympic athletes
the moral character of an individual
the heroic figures of Greek mythology

assessment_items.question_content:
**Contrapposto is demonstrated in the [[☃ dropdown 1]] created by weight bearing and relaxed limbs of this figure.** 



![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a603b524e704dec6402b2202c004d637.jpg)
hints:
Contrapposto highlights the sophisticated mechanics of the human body to counterbalance relaxed and weight bearing limbs.  

**[Watch this video to review.](/humanities/ancient-art-civilizations/greek-art/classical/v/polykleitos-doryphoros-spear-bearer)**
